decision.rationale: The mechanism is not adoption-ready yet; keep it experimental until readiness and evidence gaps are closed.
decision.stay_experimental_reason: Adaptation decision must exist and reach proceed_to_proof before adoption.; Original-vs-adapted and original-vs-improved delta evidence must be substantive.; All baggage must be explicitly excluded or justified before adoption.; Required proof has not been executed yet.; The target artifact type is still unclear after the selection matrix.; Meta-useful adoptions must declare a self-improvement category.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
